message:
fix: Improve backtrack encoder + add greedy encoder (both incomplete)

Findings after debugging:
- Backtracking encoder: 46% correct (276/594 tests)
  - Missing: Aho-Corasick automaton, prefix tables, pair validation
  - Needs complex data structures from rs-bpe to work properly

- Greedy longest-match encoder: 46% correct (276/594 tests)
  - Wrong approach for BPE - doesn't respect merge order
  - BPE must be merge-based, not longest-match based

- HashMap encoder (existing): 88% correct (522/594 tests) ✅
  - Correct merge-based BPE algorithm
  - Slow O(n³) due to array shifting on every merge
  - Currently the best working encoder

Key insight: BPE tokenization requires respecting merge priority order
from training, not just greedy longest-match. rs-bpe's backtracking is
an optimization of merge-based BPE, not a replacement for it.

Next: Optimize HashMap encoder to remove O(n³) shifting bottleneck
